ancient_rules.name: Ancient Rules
ancient_rules.description: Held item: Once per battle allows one Dragon-type move to gain +1 priority, then is consumed.

revival_ring.name: Revival Ring
revival_ring.description: If holder faints, revive it once per battle with 30% HP from the GY.

life_amulet.name: Life Amulet
life_amulet.description: Restores 15% max HP per turn while on the field.

choice_band.name: Pot of Greed - Choice Band
choice_band.description: Boosts Atk by 1.5x, but restricts user to the first selected move until swapped out.

choice_specs.name: Graceful Charity - Choice Specs
choice_specs.description: Boosts SpAtk by 1.5x, but restricts user to the first selected move until swapped out.

choice_scarf.name: Upstart Goblin - Choice Scarf
choice_scarf.description: Boosts Spe by 1.5x, but restricts user to the first selected move until swapped out.

focus_sash.name: Swords of Revealing Light - Focus Sash
focus_sash.description: Prevents a 1-hit KO from full health, leaving the monster at 1 HP. Consumed on use.

life_orb.name: Supply Squad - Life Orb
life_orb.description: Boosts move damage by 1.3x, but forces the user to lose 10% Max HP per attack.

leftovers.name: Dian Keto the Cure Master - Leftovers
leftovers.description: Passively restores 1/16th Max HP at the end of every active turn sequence.

expert_belt.name: Mage Power - Expert Belt
expert_belt.description: Boosts damage by 1.2x when striking with a super-effective move.

assault_vest.name: Solemn Judgment - Assault Vest
assault_vest.description: Increases SpDef by 1.5x, but blocks the user from activating any Status moves.

heavy_duty_boots.name: Mystical Space Typhoon - Heavy-Duty Boots
heavy_duty_boots.description: Protects the holding monster from trap/hazard damage upon switching onto the field.

rocky_helmet.name: Mirror Force - Rocky Helmet
rocky_helmet.description: Deals 1/6th Max HP recoil damage back to any attacker using contact physical moves.

eject_button.name: Heavy Storm - Eject Button
eject_button.description: Forces the monster to immediately switch out to a bench reserve when struck by an attack.

air_balloon.name: Waboku - Air Balloon
air_balloon.description: Grants immunity to EARTH attacks; breaks instantly when struck by any direct move damage.

sitrus_berry.name: Monster Reborn - Sitrus Berry
sitrus_berry.description: Automatically restores 25% Max HP when the holder drops below 50% health. Consumed on use.

mental_herb.name: Dark Bribe - Mental Herb
mental_herb.description: Instantly cures infatuation, taunts, or move-bind lock states. Consumed on use.

iron_ball.name: Book of Moon - Iron Ball
iron_ball.description: Lowers Spe modifier by 50% and grounds airborne or levitating element properties.

flame_orb.name: Foolish Burial - Flame Orb
flame_orb.description: Inflicts self-burn state at the end of the turn, cutting physical Atk but enabling specific abilities.

toxic_orb.name: Card Destruction - Toxic Orb
toxic_orb.description: Inflicts self-badly poisoned state at the end of the turn, ticking up damage recursively.

lagging_tail.name: Imperial Order - Lagging Tail
lagging_tail.description: Forces the user to execute moves last inside their priority brackets regardless of raw Spe.

white_herb.name: Limiter Removal - White Herb
white_herb.description: Resets all lowered stats back to neutral formatting values once per battle. Consumed on use.

black_sludge.name: United We Stand - Black Sludge
black_sludge.description: Restores 1/16th Max HP for ZOMBIE/FIEND monsters; drains health from any other archetypes.
